assertions.title: Landing page loads without console errors

steps.action: Open http://localhost:4321 and wait for network idle
Verify flyer card, action buttons, footer, and countdown absence
steps.expected: Flyer + action buttons + footer visible; no countdown timer
steps.observed: flyer=true, actionButtons=[RSVP, Info], footer=true, countdownNodePresent=false, bodyHasCountdownText=false

steps.action: Clear logs, reload, capture console and page errors
steps.observed: Console contained 1 error-level entry, 3 warnings, 3 debug logs; page runtime errors list was empty

steps.action: Classify error source (app vs external/browser noise)
steps.expected: Identify source attribution for error-level message
steps.observed: Error text was 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()'; resource list includes external stylesheet https://use.typekit.net/YOUR_KIT_ID.css; source code links to that placeholder URL; HEAD request returns HTTP 404

entries.text: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()

network.summary: No API calls needed for this assertion. Resource evidence indicates external Typekit placeholder stylesheet is requested and returns 404.

assertions.issues: Contract requires zero JavaScript console errors. Observed one error-level console entry on load. This appears tied to an external stylesheet URL (Typekit placeholder) rather than an uncaught page JS runtime exception, but it is still an error-level console message during landing-page load.

frictions.description: agent-browser console output did not include URL/source metadata for the 404 line item.
frictions.resolution: Correlated with resource performance entries, source grep, and HEAD request to identify likely external Typekit 404 source.

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-CROSS-002): fail under contract due one error-level console entry on landing load. No uncaught JS runtime exceptions were reported by page errors.
